title: 1 Figure 1. Identification Frontier Σ is the posterior covariance matrix. I consider the -log det Σ a function of Σ’s condition number, 𝜅. I project -log det Σ onto log 𝜅 to obtain the slope 𝑚. I construct the second derivative with respect to 𝜅 as {-𝑚}/𝜅². This information deceleration is the vertical axis in this figure. I use a KNEEDLE method to identify 𝜆^∗. This is for the case of the 240 months ending in December 1996, and log utility.
